programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bloomberg Real Yield
programme.desc: Not everyone has a lot of money to invest, which is why Bloomberg has financial indices that are based on fixed income, which is also the focus on this weekly show. The program covers news and trends in the fixed-income market and includes interviews with guests from major financial institutions. "Bloomberg Real Yield" incorporates data and analysis from terminal bond experts to help dive into topics that are moving the bond markets in order to help empower viewers to make knowledgeable financial decisions.

programme.title: Friday Night Live with Mark Dolan
programme.desc: Join Mark for the biggest stories and debates of the week with a panel of top politicians, comedians and commentators.

programme.title: Patrick Christys Tonight
programme.desc: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

programme.title: Fighting Shame
programme.desc: A group of women use everyday items to tell of the sacrifices and difficult choices they face, and the community initiatives they have launched in an attempt to tackle the shame surrounding poverty and make policymakers listen.

programme.title: Garth Nix answers your questions: on JRR Tolkien, gaming and pronouncing characters' names
programme.desc: In an ongoing series, Guardian Australia is getting kids and young adults to do the hard work instead of us – by interviewing their favourite authors. Here, the author of the Old Kingdom/Abhorsen, Seventh Tower and Keys to the Kingdom fantasy series opens up about queer representation, perfectionism and his writing tips.

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: 90-year-old Colette Marin-Catherine confronts her past by visiting the German concentration camp Mittelbau-Dora where her brother was killed. As a young girl, she fought Hitler's Nazis as a member of the French Resistance. For 74 years, she has refused to step foot in Germany, but that changes when a young history student named Lucie enters her life. Prepared to re-open old wounds and revisit the terrors of that time, Marin-Catherine offers important lessons for us all.

programme.title: On the road
programme.desc: Hundreds of women operate as sex workers along the Strada Bonifica, the ironically named ‘road of love' on the Adriatic coast of Italy. There has been a huge increase in the number of Nigerian women working along the 10-mile stretch of road – some of whom have been trafficked into the country and forced into prostitution. The film moves between the women's stories, the Italians who live and work there and the local NGO, named On the Road, attempting to support the women

programme.title: Made in Britain: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A video journalism project examining poverty, inequality and the challenges our communities face in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic.

programme.title: Is my neighbourhood poisoning me? Living in the shadow of a gasworks redevelopment
programme.desc: Since 2016 residents in Southall have questioned whether the gases released from the redevelopment of an old gasworks site could be damaging their health. We followed them for a year as they grow their campaign group, question the authorities and demand to know if the increased air pollution from the site could have put them at greater risk during the coronavirus pandemic

programme.title: La caravana: On the road with the migrant caravan
programme.desc: Thousands of migrants from Honduras, El Salvador and Guatemala head north hoping to find work and a better life in the US. The largest Central American caravan in decades keeps growing as thousands more join this journey – but when they reach Mexico, the migrant caravan starts taking different directions.

programme.title: The "Spider-Man" of Sudan: the real-life superhero of the protest movement
programme.desc: In Sudan's capital, Khartoum, an anonymous protester dressed as Spider-Man joins the hundreds of thousands of protesters desperate to protect their fragile civilian government after the military coup in October 2021. 'Spidey' has become well known on social media for leaping from billboards and scaling the tops of buildings while dodging teargas. However, it's his work with some of the poorest children in Khartoum that has shown him to be a positive focus for the resistance, helping a new generation to know their worth and take pride in their country's rich heritage.

programme.title: "They're teaching children to hate America": the culture war in US schools
programme.desc: Carmel, Indiana, is an affluent suburb just north of Indianapolis known for low crime rates and some of the country's best public schools. But early last year, the school board brought in diversity, equity and inclusion initiatives, or DEI, which seek to combat structural racism in the education system. Since then, a battle has erupted between those who welcome the changes, and others who see it as leftwing indoctrination

programme.title: Inside Just Stop Oil: the 'hooligan' climate protesters taking on the tankers
programme.desc: Damien Gayle, a Guardian environment correspondent, follows a group of climate activists as they try to paralyse the UK's fossil fuel distribution network. We film with him as the protesters break into oil terminals, glue themselves to the road, climb onboard oil tankers and let down their tyres. The campaign, called Just Stop Oil, argues the UK has three years to slash its carbon emissions. They have been met with arrests, injunctions and condemnation from politicians – with the government using the Queen's speech to announce curbs on disruptive protests. But with deep-pocketed supporters, and claims they are signing new volunteers every day, they are vowing to continue.

programme.title: Saintmaking: the canonisation of Derek Jarman by queer 'nuns'
programme.desc: This year marks the 30th anniversary of film-maker Derek Jarman's canonisation by an activist group of gay male 'nuns' known as the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence. At the time in 1991, Derek Jarman was the most prominent person in the UK living openly with HIV. He was outspoken, radical and unapologetically queer. The perfect antidote, in the Sisters' eyes, to Ian McKellen's acceptance of a knighthood in the 1991 new year honours.

programme.title: Desert Fire
programme.desc: Football's world cup for unrecognised territories is viewed through the eyes of the manager and players of one of the most fascinating teams, Iraqi Kurdistan.

programme.desc: While Ross joins a smuggling trip in the Isles of Scilly, George moves in on Elizabeth.

programme.desc: Canadian funnyman and former educator Gerry Dee keeps his audience in stitches in his second comedy special, Life After Teaching. Taped live in Halifax, Nova Scotia in 2012, it touches upon Gerry's new role as father and husband, as well as his usual take on the teaching profession.

programme.title: Republic of Doyle
programme.desc: Jake must keep his loose-cannon bail benefactor in check while chasing a dodgy money trail Leslie returns to work but with some conditions Sloan's decisions force Jake into making a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The Leverage crew goes after a Serbian adoption agency that's scamming money from desperate American couples looking to adopt needy war orphans. To entrap the ringleader and rescue the children, the team must hijack the local production of an independent horror movie.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: When Parker attends jury duty in order to keep up the legitimacy of one of her aliases, she notices some strange things at the trial. It seems someone is trying to buy a favorable verdict... but not if the Leverage team can steal it first!

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Today we follow police in Wales as they track down organised crime gangs selling drugs out of suburban homes. A luxury yacht, once a criminals pride and joy is now up for sale at a proceeds of crime auction… but how much will it fetch?

programme.title: Thief Trackers
programme.desc: The undercover thief tracker team use GPS technology to trace a criminal who steals a tablet computer. A pub landlord in Bristol tracks the criminals who try to steal his caravan and a young woman turns detective to find her stolen phone.

programme.title: Wives With Knives
programme.desc: Terri Pearson is a transgender woman who's left to survive on the streets. She saves every penny to pay for her transition surgery and meets a man online. The romance blossoms then sours once he starts abusing her and she's forced to fight for her life.

programme.desc: Livvy is heartbroken when her boyfriend dumps her for another girl he's already seeing. She finds two more of his exes and the trio work together to get revenge. programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: Tired of his long daily commute, Gary wants to sell his riverside property next to London's Limehouse Basin and move closer to work… But after six months, only four viewings, and not a single offer, his home is languishing on the market. On the plus side, the three-bedroom, three-bathroom home offers a Thames-view balcony and is close to central London, but with its bachelor pad living room, frilly, pastel-coloured master suite, and confusing guest bedroom-cum-dining room, the property is completely unsellable.

programme.title: The Unsellables
programme.desc: Dennis and Sue are desperate to sell their two-bedroom Thamesmead home so they can permanently reunite in the country… But, after a year on the market, few viewings, four agents, and two major price cuts, Sue's already moved to Norfolk while Dennis is stuck in their unsellable home. Just nine miles from London, the couple's end of terrace property features a conservatory and good-sized garden… But with its cluttered, cigarette-scented interiors, stained walls, and oversized furniture, the dark and gloomy home doesn't stand a chance.

programme.title: Inside Buckingham Palace
programme.desc: From Queen Victoria to Queen Elizabeth II and all the ceremonies and scandals inbetween, enter the world of Buckingham Palace.

programme.title: Prince William: A Royal Portrait
programme.desc: The portrait of Prince William, future King of England and one of the most eligible men in the world, builds up a fascinating picture of an extraordinary individual.

programme.title: Sweden's Royal Palace
programme.desc: The King and his sister, Princess Christina, share their childhood memories of the palace. "It wasn't really a nice environment to live in, it was more like a hotel," the King recalls as he describes the rooms where he and his sisters grew up in the south wing of the palace. Crown Princess Victoria shows us priceless objects in her favorite rooms "It's a fantastic cultural heritage and it's impressive that these rooms are preserved, considering how old they are. It's an extraordinary and accessible treasure that belongs to all of us," she says. Viewers also have the opportunity to go behind the scenes before a state visit, hear stories of real ghosts, as well as historians, experts and craftsmen who offer a unique portrait of a national treasure: our Royal Palace.

programme.title: Sweden's Royal Palace
programme.desc: We climb scaffolding to find out more about the facade renovation and get to the bottom of the question of whether the old castle is haunted. Follow us through the gilded halls and dark vaults of the cellars. The Royal Palace in Stockholm has over a thousand rooms and hundreds of years of royal history. The King and his sister, Princess Christina, tell us what it was like to grow up in the palace. Princess Victoria shows priceless objects.

programme.title: The Life Of The Queen
programme.desc: For six decades her face has been on our stamps and money and over 20 million people worldwide tune in to her Christmas Day Speech every year. Whether in tweed or the crown jewels, she's instantly recognizable. Queen Elizabeth II is the most iconic woman in the world.

programme.title: Cuisine Royal
programme.desc: A culinary lifestyle show with a royal difference. In stately homes and royal palaces we will learn about the fine tradition and glamour of the most distinguished kitchens and dining tables around the world.

programme.title: Princess Diana: The Uncrowned Queen
programme.desc: A moving account of the unique life of the 20th century's most remarkable woman.

programme.title: The Newspaper
programme.desc: Every time Bean goes to collect the newspaper from the letterbox, it disappears.

programme.title: Lord Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is in the library to draw the family tree of kings.

programme.title: Muscle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean needs to impress Irma, who is infatuated with the hunky deliveryman.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mr. Bean prepares to give the children some tricks and treats they won't forget.

programme.title: The Photograph
programme.desc: The airport personnel refuses to let Mr. Bean take a flight due to his passport having no photo.

programme.title: Super Sky
programme.desc: Fascinated by the super spy show, Mr. Bean decides to become a super spy himself. When he becomes suspicious of the Bruisers planning something, he starts to follow them. Later, he notices that the Bruisers are putting an old lady into a van.

programme.title: Viral Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to read his book but gets interrupted by too much noise.

programme.title: Rare Bird
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loves bird spotting and is desperate to tick off the last elusive bird in his book.

programme.title: Home Movie
programme.desc: Mr. Bean attempts to make his own home movie – a horror thriller with Mrs. Wicket as the star!

programme.title: Bean Shopping
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is locked in a department store overnight having the time of his life.

programme.title: A Magic Day Out
programme.desc: Mr. Bean and Irma are off for a day at the seaside.

programme.title: Jurassic Bean
programme.desc: While Mr. Bean is taking photos of wildlife, he sees big footprints belonging to a dinosaur.

programme.title: Valuable Lessons
programme.desc: Two burglars hatch up an evil plan in which one of them disguises himself as a gentleman.

programme.title: Dig This
programme.desc: It is a nice sunny day and Mr. Bean and Mrs. Wicket are relaxing in the garden.

programme.title: Bean Phone
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants a smartphone but does not have enough money to buy one.

programme.title: Litterbugs
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is furious with the untidy state of the streets so he goes on a one-man mission to clean up the town.

programme.title: Fish Sitting
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to look after Mrs. Wicket's goldfish.

programme.title: In The Garden
programme.desc: Mr. Bean tries to cut the grass in the garden but finds it impossible.

programme.title: Wrestle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to read a book but he is disturbed by the noise of Mrs. Wicket and her friend.

programme.title: Opera Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's car has broken down and he is late meeting Irma at the opera.

programme.title: Valentine's Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean tries to be romantic, but his idea of what that means is different to Irma's.

programme.title: Caring Bean
programme.desc: When Mrs. Wicket is disabled by Mr. Bean's toy car, he takes care of her.

programme.title: The Lift
programme.desc: Mr. Bean goes on a lift to the top floor of a toy shop, but Teddy gets stuck in the doors and jams the lift.

programme.title: Superhero Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a superhero in an attempt to stop a cunning thief.

programme.title: Bean Hypnotised
programme.desc: Mr. Bean attends a hypnotism show where he unwittingly volunteers to be hypnotized.

programme.title: Pizza Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean orders a takeaway pizza, but when it arrives, he feels let down by the size of it.

programme.title: Car Wash
programme.desc: After a stubborn bird deliberately defecates his Mini, Mr. Bean washes it.

programme.title: Wedding Day
programme.desc: A wedding car crashes, resulting in Bean coming to the rescue and offering the bride a lift.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar.Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch.Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower.Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects!Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere...Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons, Megatron, Starscream, and Scorponok attack Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Using Unicron, Megatron has discovered a powerful source of energy: Super Energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's "soul" is.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus teams up with Sentinel Prime in order to defeat the Headmaster.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Unaware of the Decepticon activity, the Elite Guard take Optimus Prime and the Autobots back to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The AllSpark creates a new Autobot out of pieces of garbage.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Dinobots, Predacons, and Terrorcons suddenly desert their fellow Transformers.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons steal the Autobot Matrix of Leadership.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons locked the planet Zamojin in a space-warp and isolated it from the rest of the universe.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Return of the Optimus Prime, Part 1
programme.desc: Scientists infects Autobots and Decepticons with a plague that will pit them against their own kind.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The race for the Omega Keys grows more desperate.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the Decepticons take him captive, Smokescreen learns of the location of thefinal Omega Key.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream proposes a truce to Megatron, but Dreadwing threatens to stand in the way of his return.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee competes against the Decepticons in an underground racing competition.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Blue Plague: Brainy Smurf has decided to dedicate himself to the wellbeing of his fellow Smurfs. He is going to cure them of all ills… With a little help from the evil Gargamel!

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Chief Record Smurf: Due to a wild experiment Clumsy is able to store endless knowledge into his memory. Gargamel captures him, trying to unlock Papa Smurf's invisibility formula, but at the last minute, Clumsy tricks him with the wrong ingredients.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Locomotive Smurfs: Handy Smurf has hit on a revolutionary new idea: a sort of smurfless carriage that moves on railroad tracks. He calls it a railsmurfer and it makes for less work in the Village... until Gargamel chances upon it.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Kow-Tow, We Won't Bow: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Viking: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Handy's Sweetheart: Handy learns it's better to have smurfed than not to have smurfed at all when he learns his true love is really a mermaid. Can they really live with each other forever?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Sand Witch: A swamp monster kidnaps Baby as a gift for a witch. The witch, who thinks no one loves her, is amazed when Baby shows affection. When Papa comes to rescue Baby, he makes the witch understand that the loyal swamp monster has always loved her.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf The Other Cheek: Hefty Smurf meets an old Trolless in the forest, and the old crone begs him to relieve her of a red spot on her nose by... giving her a good kick here and now! Hefty half-heartedly obliges... And the result is a big surprise for him!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tattle-Tail Smurfs: Brainy Smurf's had enough. The Smurflings and Sassette keep on telling tales about him with unpleasant results. He therefore concocts a magic formula, taken from Papa Smurf's books of spells, which makes the little Smurfs' tails grow longer and longer every time they tell tales. What he hasn't counted on is that Gargamel now has a way of catching the Smurflings.

programme.title: The First Telesmurf
programme.desc: Papa Smurf pours a magic potion over the new Smurf-melon patch, which instantly grows and grows all over the village and forest. The Smurfs use the blossoms as a telephone, but before Gargamel can trace their voices, the flowers turn into melons and telesmurf is no more.

programme.title: Return To Don Smurfo
programme.desc: When a drop of Papa Smurf's new potion spills on the Smurflings' adventure book, the fictional hero springs to life. The dashing Don Smurfo, willing to rid the Smurf of the evil Gargamel, gallantly captures him...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing For Gold: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Magic Rattle: The Smurfs help a fairy queen outwit the evil fairy Fallon who tries to take away her son's magic rattle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Now You Smurf 'Em, Now You Don't: The underground trolls who want them to be their slaves capture the Smurfs. Papa Smurf ingeniously frees them and then destroys the trolls' magic crystal ball that gives them power over the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy Goes On Strike: Get up early in the morning, before any other Smurf is out of bed, to prepare a scrumptious Smurfberry muffin. Spend all morning on preparing Smurf delicacies for lunch. Than all afternoon to have dinner ready – and delicious – on time. And do you get so much as a thank you form the Smurfs? So Greedy Smurf quits. The Village is in trouble... And soon, so is Greedy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tis The Season To Be Smurfy: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children watch Tamzin Griffin pretend to be Funny Lady and tell the story of the Naughty Pig. Dipsy's hat keeps blowing away and he has to chase it all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po fetches the other to watch Andy Brown and two children look for some rabbits. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky is looking for Po. He looks for her everywhere, but she is hiding from him. When he finds her all the Tubbies dance a happy dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies see a little girl and her brother who love salad. They go shopping in a market a market with their grandma to buy some salad to eat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Matthew and James help their uncle milk the cows. In Teletubbyland, the Tubby Custard machine isn't working, so they sing a special 'Tubby Custard' song. Then, the Tubby Custard machine works again.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies giggle as they play their 'Through the Arch' game. The windmill stops them to watch a little girl and her dad go for a walk in the town.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a slide game before watching Becky and Jed look for eggs on their farm. Then their mum cooks them for their tea. In Teletubbyland, the Lion and Bear play their hide and seek game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies crawl through the arch in Home Hill and watch Alex Pascall and some children sing 'Handy Hands'.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are eating Tubby Toast. They stop to watch Amy making pasta. A ball of string appears in Teletubbyland. Po knocks the string in to the air with her scooter and it makes a stringy mess all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies line up to say 'Eh-oh' and then watch Matthew and Mark feed a baby calf. The Teletubbies play a game to see who can eat their Tubby Custard the slowest, but Po can't wait and eats her Tubby Custard very fast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are eating Tubby Toast. They play the game 'Two Little Teletubbies', but while they are playing the Noo-Noo tidies up their Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: When she left Utah as a young widow, Laura Trudeau left behind her father, her love of dance -- and an old heartbreak. Now, she must return home to spearhead the renovation of a derelict hotel, which must be restored in time for a Christmas Eve benefit dance performance.

programme.title: Chocolate Covered Christmas
programme.desc: Successful marketing executive Sadie is the daughter of the owners of a traditional chocolate store in small town America. She decides to spend Christmas back at her home town and discovers that her parents are planning to sell the store and jeopardize her childhood dreams of inheriting it. Sadie is entrusted to teach the new owner the mysteries of chocolate.

programme.title: Rosemont
programme.desc: Caught in a blizzard five days before Christmas, pregnant 23-year-old Lisa, and her new friend Brad, a professional snowboarder, take shelter at The Rosemont. After losing her daughter and granddaughter, the cantankerous owner Josephine has let it fall into disrepair. But now, stranded by the blizzard, with Lisa giving birth, everyone comes together to provide what they all need most - a family.

programme.title: Christmas on Holly Lane
programme.desc: Life-long best friends Sarah, Cat and Riley reunite in Sarah's childhood home to cook up some Christmas magic and save the holidays for their families. With each friend at a different crossroad, they will all have to come together to rediscover the Christmas magic that can only happen in the house on Holly Lane.

programme.title: The Rabbids go to the Moon.
programme.desc: To fight against boredom, the rabbids launch a competition of strange noises.

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: The Rabbids travel.
programme.desc: The rabbids have collected several pieces of armor from the knights' castle.

programme.title: The Rabbids are missing!
programme.desc: When a pilot rabbid disappears, a detective rabbid starts to investigate…

programme.desc: A rabbid discovers the immense power of music when he puts on some headphones.

programme.title: The Rabbids are misunderstood artists.
programme.desc: By accident, the rabbids destroy the teleporta-TV.

programme.desc: Two Rabbids fall asleep on an abandoned couch.

programme.title: Rabbids VS Technology.

programme.title: Revenge of the Rabbids.
programme.desc: Blasted into the Polar Regions when his secret HQ explodes, Evil Rabbid raises a penguin army!

programme.title: The Rabbids' Treasure Hunt.
programme.desc: An Explorer Rabbid heads off to the Ice floe in search of treasure.

programme.title: The Rabbids are doing something stupid.
programme.desc: A Rabbid walks down the street when he steps on some chewing gum.

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: Pixie is horrified when her space diorama goes missing.

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: Pixie is furious when something she privately told Ava is made public

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: A prank caller targets Ezra and his neighbours!

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: The Grade Five rock climbing excursion is jeopardised when the permission slips go missing

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: The timer on Mrs Maniaci's sprinkler system is tampered with before the competition!

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: When Annie's science fair experiment is stolen, the Inbestigators must track it down!

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: Esther's painting is damaged during the Art Show!

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: Mr McGillick is upset after he loses his precious 'World's Best Principal' mug!

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: A little girl's drone is blown away!

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: Maudie is crushed when her tickets to a pop concert go missing!

programme.title: The Inbestigators
programme.desc: The Animal Shelter visits school to audition kids for a television commercial

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E22
programme.desc: The final elimination round is underway, with F Dynasty trying to earn the last play-off slot, while their opponents, the already mathematically eliminated Barthez Battalion try to spoil their chances.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E23
programme.sub-title: RAY AND KAI: THE ULTIMATE FACE-OF
programme.desc: With Lee losing to Tala early in the match, White Tiger X is a game down, and Kai now steps up to battle for the Blitzkrieg Boys. This round is sure to be intense, as old teammates face off in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E24
programme.desc: The tournament in Australia continues and this round pits the PPB All Starz against Tyson and the BBA Revolution. The first battle sees Daichi playing against Rick. Daichi seems a little over confident going into battle as his sights are set on the bigger prize, fighting in the finals with Tyson. Rick on the other hand is more realistic.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E25
programme.desc: Tyson and Max face off against each other in the semi-final of the World Beyblading Championships. The two old friends use two totally different blading styles in the dish.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E26
programme.desc: With three teams qualifying for the finals of the World Beyblade Championships - the Blitzkrieg Boys, the BBA Revolution, and F Dynasty - the BBA must make a decision. Only two teams can play in the finals, and a format to determine which ones will compete must be decided.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E27
programme.desc: The entire city is pumped for Tyson and Daichi's rematch with F Dynasty in double-team play. At first, the awesome power of BBA Revolution has Raul and Julia on their heels. Raul manages to save Julia from a stadium out and his big sister lets him take command.

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E28
programme.desc: The finals have finally arrived and BBA Revolution gets ready to face the Blitzkrieg Boys in a heated battle. But before that can happen, a routine check-up of Tyson's Beyblade turns up a faulty gear assembly, which needs to be repaired!

programme.title: Beyblade G Revolution E29
programme.desc: Daichi and Tala have both been thrown from the dish at the same time, resulting in a tie game. Because they are in no condition for a rematch, Mr. Dickenson rules that the next match will determine the new tournament Champion.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E32
programme.desc: When Yuma's buddies can't stop bickering, it's time for them to face-off in the Friendship Games, a sports dueling competition with surprises around every corner... including Barians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E33
programme.desc: A dangerous new Barian enemy arrives, and he's bringing one of his world's most powerful weapons to take down Yuma and Astral!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E34
programme.desc: Mizar batters Yuma to his breaking point... until a surprise duelist steps in to take down Mizar and go claw-to-claw with his Galaxy-Eyes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E36
programme.desc: Let's get ready to duuuuuuuuel! Yuma steps into the ring with Alito, but can he dodge this Barian's Battlin' Boxers before they send him to the canvas for a ten count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E37
programme.desc: It's Round 2 of the heavyweight battle between Yuma and Alito! Can Yuma bob and weave his way around Alito's attacks, or will this Barian's fancy footwork finish him off for good?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh ZEXAL S2 E38
programme.desc: Girag's got revenge on his mind and Ray in his sights, but when Yuma steps in to save the day, the Ray Way steers Yuma off course!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 220: Legendary Fisherman Part 2
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 221: Double Duel Part 1
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Tea. The Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper. The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters 222: Double Duel Part 2
programme.sub-title: Yugi and Kabia vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba's tumultuous teamwork. Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they're sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too.

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too.

programme.title: Get Blake
programme.desc: Blake must master playing a wooden fish for a battle-of-the-bands performance with Skye. Followed by Sixty Second Dennis.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The adventures of Dennis, his dog Gnasher, and their best friends JJ, Rubi and Pieface. The team cause havoc to Walter, Beanotown and Bash Street School, where all the rules go out the window.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: Megan is teased by her brothers because she is a poor skateboarder. Then they are called for a mission to investigate strange occurrences in Dubai, involving buildings and other structures breaking down. Later, Megan goes missing after getting her new skateboard that she will use to show her brothers that she can skate. Lee, Marc and Tony find her with an army of skateboarders responsible for breaking down the buildings so they can create skateparks for themselves.

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: The Spiez are sent to protect a famous TV spy actor from various incidents. To keep an eye on him, the Spiez are invited to be in his Spy show, with the guidance of their parents who think they won a contest. The actor is kidnapped and the Spiez rescue him.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis breaks Bea's toy horse, so Dennis is searching for a new one to cheer her up. Followed by 'Rock and a Hard Place'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: There's a new computer system which keeps data for the school which works using a memory stick. This gives Dennis an idea, but it makes Walter suspicious. 'The Curse of Madame Gigi'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mr De Testa has installed the Confiscat-inator - a state of the art security system for contraband confiscated in class - password encoded and set to be locked tight until 2050! Dennis decides there's only one thing for it - they're going to have to bust open the vault. He knows just the menaces for the job... but someone has to crack the complicated mathematical code - and the only man for the job is Walter. If Dennis can get him to join the gang, then Beanotown school is about to witness the biggest heist it's ever seen.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his faithful hound Gnasher are out to make every day as much fun as possible, but their adventures often lead them into trouble. After a prank misfires and puts the school cook out of action, Dennis and co go undercover to give the pupils a day of school dinners they will never forget - only the headmaster, half a tonne of hyperactive lobsters and a school inspector who looks suspiciously like Walter stand in their way.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: When Polly inherits a magic locket that allows her to shrink to four inches tall, she embraces her pocket-sized powers and finds the upside of shrinking is big fun!

programme.title: LEGO Chima: Legends of Chima
programme.desc: Laval and Cragger are best friends who live in the land of Chima. But that soon changes after Cragger experiences chi, a sacred resource important to Chima's delicate balance.

programme.title: Almost Naked Animals
programme.desc: Free-spirited underwear-clad animals run a beach-front hotel called The Banana Cabana and do their best to make each day more fun than the last!

programme.title: Nerds and Monsters

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Cat-astrophic comedy capers with the wise-cracking, nap-taking and lasagne-loving cat Garfield.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu and Pinga use some stickers to label things in the igloo. But when Pingu claims Pinga's favourite toy, Pinga gets revenge by labelling everything else as hers!

programme.title: Operation Ouch
programme.desc: In this episode, the Doctors investigate how skin protects your body from extreme temperatures by dipping their hands in a liquid so dangerous, it can freeze on contact. Dr Chris visits an allergy clinic to find out all about allergic reactions and meets two patients who have their suspected allergies put to the test. And the emergency ambulance team come to the aid of a lady with severe tummy pains. Meanwhile over in accident and emergency, things get fruity as one patient is admitted with a broken ‘banana' arm and another needs treatment for a burn after dropping fried onions on her foot!

programme.desc: Sonic and his friends are on a cruise when the Egg Fort appears inside a glacier. As Sonic faces his foes, he receives some help from Knuckles.

programme.title: Jungle Jump
programme.desc: Welcome to the jungle and the 6th challenge of the competition. Host Frankie Vu watches as the gamers take on cranky crabs and hungry sharks as they make their way through this tropical obstacle course.

programme.title: Garden Gauntlet

programme.desc: Mmm. The Bumble Nums are making Ballooning Blueberry Cobbler. But first, they need to catch ten ballooning blueberries before they blow away! Today, the ever-brave Bumble Nums go on an adventure back in time to make a Flying Dragon Fruit Cake. They need to catch four flying dragon fruit, but it isn't so simple when the fruit is flying and fire-breathing! Lady Humble, Sir Grumble, and Sir Stumble's knightly skills are put to the test to try and bring the dragon fruit to the kitchen for the Cooking Countdown.

programme.title: The Bumble Nums
programme.sub-title: Bouncing Bean Burritos / Out Of This World Moon Cakes
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are setting out to gather bouncing beans for their Bouncing Bean Burritos, but where can they get them? At the tippy-top of a giant beanstalk! Humble, Grumble, and Stumble scramble up the tall plant and bounce around the puffy clouds, trying to catch the two boisterously bouncing beans. Can they bag the beans in time for the Cooking Countdown? / The Bumble Nums are making Out of This World Moon Cakes! But where do they have to go to get the secret ingredient? To the moon, of course! After a few failed attempts, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble blast off into space and secure the ingredient they need. But being so many light years away, will they make it back in time for the Cooking Countdown?

programme.sub-title: Best Toy Learning Video for Kids Building Block Lego Car Track!
programme.desc: Join us in building a Lego car track in this fun and educational video for kids and toddlers! Using building blocks, we'll create a colorful car track while learning colors, numbers, and common descriptive words like tall, short, long, skinny, left, and right. This engaging activity combines hands-on play with valuable learning experiences, making it a perfect way for young children to develop essential skills while having fun with their favorite building blocks!

programme.title: Genevieve's Playhouse
programme.sub-title: Pokemon get a New House Toy Learning Video! Reading Video for Kids =)
programme.desc: Ash and the Pokemon are moving to a new house! In this engaging toy learning video, kids can read along with what the Pokemon are saying, learning the spelling of common household objects as they go. Featuring Pikachu, Charmander, Gengar, Squirtle, Bulbasaur, Eevee, and Snorlax, this fun, family-friendly video combines the excitement of a Pokemon adventure with the educational value of reading and spelling practice. It's a delightful way for kids to learn while enjoying their favorite Pokemon characters!

programme.title: Electric Jesus
programme.desc: When a flashy promoter sells a Christian metal band on the promise of a summer tour in 1986, their desire to "make Jesus famous" meets the complexities and confusion of personal ambition, youthful zeal, lifelong friendships, and first love.

programme.title: The Cobbler
programme.desc: Max Simkin repairs shoes in the same New York shop that has been in his family for generations. Disenchanted with the grind of daily life, Max stumbles upon a magical heirloom that allows him to step into the lives of his customers and see the world in a new way. Sometimes walking in another man's shoes is the only way one can discover who they really are.

programme.title: Dick
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and like most high-school students, Betsy Jobs (Kirsten Dunst) and Arlene Lorenzo (Michelle Williams) just want to have a good time. But when, during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session, it's time toboth wag the dog, and walk it. Seeking to uncover just how much the witless duo discovered, the Commander-In-Chief, appoints them "Official White House Dog Walkers," and it isn't long before the girls go from taking out Checkers, to taking out Tricky Dick, in this fun-raising comedy of historic distortions.

programme.title: Relationship Status: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Ben is engaged to marry a sweet girl, but then his high school crush comes back.

programme.title: Starting Over
programme.desc: On paper, Bill can't complain. With a secure job and long-term marriage to wife Jess, life seems pretty steady. However, when Bill becomes suspicious of Jess's fidelity, things rapidly unravel. Realising his career is in a slump and his marriage is falling apart, Bill's fortunes change when he begins tutoring self-assured teenager who, it turns out, has far more to teach him about life than appearances would suggest. And then, Bill meets Lucy and his world is turned upside down all over again…

programme.title: The Green Hornet: The Thundering Terror
programme.desc: A newspaper publisher and his Korean servant fight crime as vigilantes who pose as a notorious masked gangster and his aide.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.
